Features

Everything you need to stay ahead

PagePulse combines intelligent monitoring with AI analysis to give you a competitive edge that's always on.

Smart Change Detection

Go beyond simple text diffs. PagePulse understands page structure and detects meaningful changes in pricing, features, messaging, and layout.

  • ✓Structural page analysis
  • ✓Price change alerts
  • ✓New feature detection
  • ✓Content shift tracking

AI Noise Filtering

Cookie banners updated? Timestamp changed? PagePulse's AI filters out meaningless changes so you only get alerts that matter.

  • ✓Ignores cosmetic updates
  • ✓Filters tracking changes
  • ✓Skips ad rotations
  • ✓Zero false positives

Competitor Intelligence Reports

Get weekly AI-generated intelligence briefs that summarize all competitor activity. Understand market trends at a glance.

  • ✓Weekly AI summaries
  • ✓Trend analysis
  • ✓Strategic insights
  • ✓Email + Slack delivery

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

Start free. Upgrade when you need more power. No hidden fees, no contracts.

Free

$0forever

Perfect for getting started with competitor monitoring.

  • ✓Monitor up to 1 URL
  • ✓Daily checks
  • ✓Basic change detection
  • ✓Email notifications
  • ✓7-day change history
Most Popular

Pro

$4.99/month

For teams that need deeper competitive intelligence.

  • ✓Monitor up to 5 URLs
  • ✓Daily checks
  • ✓AI-powered change analysis
  • ✓Email notifications
  • ✓90-day change history

Business

$14.99/month

Enterprise-grade monitoring for competitive teams.

  • ✓Monitor up to 25 URLs
  • ✓Daily checks
  • ✓Advanced AI semantic analysis
  • ✓Email notifications
  • ✓Unlimited change history
  • ✓Priority support

All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

AI-powered website monitoring and competitor intelligence for modern teams.
